title: Meet HomeCanvas AI. It turns your 2D floor plan into a 3D home you can walk through.
problem: Every home starts as a PDF. Flat lines. Cold numbers. You can't feel a room from a drawing.
trace: Upload your plan. Set the scale from one known wall. Now trace. Walls snap into place. Doors, windows, rooms. And watch. Your 3D home rises live beside you.
canvas3d: Step inside. Orbit the house. Walk through it in first person. Take the guided tour, room by room. Real light pours in. Soft shadows fall. It feels like home.
edit: Make it yours. Swap floors and walls. 12 style packs, Indian Modern to Fusion Japandi. Drop in furniture that never overlaps. Move and rotate the staircase. Delete a pillar? It warns you first.
ai: Just ask. Add a sofa to the lounge. Give me 3 variants of the master bedroom. The assistant previews every change. Approve what you love. Undo anytime. All offline.
photo: Now hit Photo Mode. Watch the path tracer sharpen your room, tile by tile, until it looks like a photograph. Save it as a PNG.
audience: Homeowners and new buyers, walk your space before you commit. Architects and interior designers, pitch ideas clients can feel. Real estate developers, let buyers tour a home before the first brick is laid.
privacy: Here's the best part. Everything runs on your machine. No accounts. No uploads. No paid APIs. Your home stays yours.
outro: HomeCanvas AI. Your plan. Your home. Your machine. Want it? Drop an email to agrawalparth08@gmail.com and step inside.
